---
title: "About"
---

Methods notes for people who run or review education evaluations and care
whether the conclusions hold up: baseline equivalence, measurement, effect
sizes, and honest communication of uncertainty.

Written by Yuxia Liang, M.Ed. in Educational Leadership & Policy (University of
Washington). Author of the open source
[`baselinr`](https://github.com/zl1212-ship-it/baselinr) R package for
WWC aligned baseline equivalence.
